assistantText:
Code execution is blocked by manual approval mode. If you want me to check git status in /workspace, run this yourself:

```
cd /workspace && git status
```

Or if you want me to be able to run diagnostics directly, temporarily disable approvals:

```
hermes config set approvals.mode off
```

Then I can check the status, see if there's anything to push, and handle the push for you.
